description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit with a minimalist, open-frame design. The structure consists of a black metal frame supporting five evenly spaced, flat shelves made of a translucent or frosted material, likely glass or acrylic. The open sides and back provide clear visibility and access to the contents from multiple angles, making it suitable for display or storage in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or garages. The frame is composed of thin, straight bars, giving the unit a lightweight yet sturdy appearance. The overall aesthetic is modern and industrial, with clean lines and a functional form. There are no visible doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing its open and accessible nature.
description: A tall, open-frame shelving unit with five translucent shelves and a black metal structure, featuring a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height and five evenly spaced shelves within the open black frame.
description_view_1: Side view, nearly identical to the front, highlighting the depth and open construction of the shelving unit.
description_view_2: Rear view, mirroring the front, with clear visibility through the open frame and shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again similar to the front and side, emphasizing the symmetrical, open design.
